[{"key":"0.15246251101741026","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture1/1fd728ff-a43d-4262-92dd-2287fddc809a.png"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/orc/role_picture2/8a7c5121-9011-4c29-bbbc-8be64b7a2538.png"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.06ab7b3a4eadc8","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者善雅，身份编码E01-070242，Re-A芯片状态稳定，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅晋是一所孤院中的孤，后来与人类缔结了收养关系，成为了富豪家的养女。然而在过往的履历中，有许多家仆报告称看见她对着动物说话，认为她行为异常，不过，或许这是因为她的孤独导致的。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅的能量波动稳定、温和并且循环不息，在战斗中表现为强大的治愈能力。这股力量正如她本人一样温柔、和煦，仿佛能够抚平一切伤痛。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"虚"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2025/7/16/922499.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"} tor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【那天，善雅被收养了。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"尚且年幼的善雅跟着女管家的脚步，穿过加纳利庄园藤蔓造型的铁艺大门，走进庄园里。她好奇地看着庄园中的一切一一整齐排列的花圃、修剪精致的灌木、没有一片黄叶的树·……一切都与西弗里的孤儿院那么不同。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅被女管家领到一个有些上了年纪的男人面前，她怯生生地抬起头，看着男人的样子。男人拄着手杖，满意地看着善雅，随后微笑着摸了摸善雅的头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「以后，我们就是家人了。」男人这样说。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"家人，这是善雅只在童话书上看见过的字眼，她对此好奇又期待。书上都说，家人会互相爱护，互相帮扶，是无论在怎样的困境中都能彼此依靠的存在。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅点点头，抬头叫那个男人道：「父亲。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【庄园或许很大，但对于森林来说，还是太小。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅听大人们说，自己患有一种很严重的病，为了治病，「父亲」要求她在家静养，并严格禁止她离开庄园，还派来一个叫谛听的跟班时刻盯着她。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"然而，就算留在庄园里，善雅也并不是随时都能做自己喜欢的事情，而是每天都要面对繁重的课业—一礼仪课、音乐课、文学课、艺术课……「父亲」要求她成为一个完美的富家千金，用「规矩」和「教养」束缚起善雅想要玩耍和接触世界的双手与内心。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅并不理解「父亲」的用意，但她希望自己能作为「家人」回应「父亲」的期待，因此她一直努力地学习着。只是，在那些课程之间、短暂的休息时光里，她总是忍不住看向窗外，看向那一小片被窗框裁下的天空，以及偶尔飞过的小鸟。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅想要看看外面世界的心思与日俱增，但她只能将这份苦闷偷偷向小花、小草、小树还有那个叫谛听的人倾诉，但她从未得到过回应。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「父亲」留意到了善雅的目光，于是在善雅来到庄园整一年的「生日」时，送给了善雅一只白色的小鸟，作为她的玩伴。那只小鸟的脚上套着精致的脚环，脚环用金色的链子连接着站架。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅微笑着从「父亲」手中接过小鸟，但她的内心却感到悲伤—一小鸟本应是属于天空的啊。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【小鸟飞走了，但她留下了。】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那一天，善雅回到房间后，来到了小鸟的站架前。她将小鸟托在手里，解开了它的脚环，随后打开窗户。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"外面的风吹拂着小鸟的羽毛，它张开翅膀，振翅飞出了窗户，消失在蓝天里。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你不是很珍惜它吗，干嘛要放走它？」跟在善雅身后的谛听不解地问。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"善雅的目光凝视着天空，回答道：「父亲说，我不久后会接受一场重要的手术。虽然他没有明说，但我能从他的话语里感受到不安，所以·……我猜，那场手术会很危险。不管手术能否成功，我都没有办法离开这里。但至少，我希望那只小鸟能回到属于它的天空中去。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"谛听沉默了很久，才接着说道：「你一直想去外面看看，对吧？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「如果你能撑过去，我就背着别人，偷偷带你去外面玩一次。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「真的？」善雅的眼睛亮了起来。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「真的·……嗯，我向你保证。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"治疗"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 555|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3生命加成 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"拥有高额的治疗效果，1技能拉满后配合千兆字节能够达到多次行动的效果。大招还有复活加生命上限的效果，非常适合配合提亚马特"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12浴血+8治愈+8进化荫庇"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"千兆字节"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_300/h_259/50364/842288/2025/7/18/835929.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"uz5vxdc1zRebQ3F5","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
